prompt: We've got an existing pnpm monorepo: a Next.js frontend in packages/frontend and a Python FastAPI service in packages/api, plus a docker-compose for local infra and we use LocalStack to emulate AWS. There's no mise yet. Add our standard setup — per-module setup/lint/test/build/dev, localstack + docker tasks for spinning up local dev, and note our private npm deps come from AWS CodeArtifact. Don't break the existing package.json or lockfiles.
assertions: python tasks setup/lint/test exist (py: or python:)
aws-auth helper present and parameterized (no leaked id/domain)
every task file follows the contract
